title: selaginella tenella
intro: Selaginella tenella, also known as Chinese spikenard or Chinese spike moss, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella tenella is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
